evals.setup: Change 'add-search-filter' with all artifacts done and all tasks checked off
evals.expected_output: Should archive the change cleanly after verification
expectations: Runs openspec status to check artifact completion
Reads tasks file to check task completion

evals.description: Warn and confirm when tasks are incomplete
evals.setup: Change with some tasks still unchecked
evals.expected_output: Should warn user and ask for confirmation before proceeding
expectations: Detects incomplete tasks via task file check
Uses AskUserQuestion to confirm the user wants to proceed
Only archives after explicit user confirmation

evals.setup: Multiple active changes in the workspace
evals.expected_output: Should list changes and ask user to select
expectations: Runs openspec list to get available changes
Uses AskUserQuestion to let user choose

should_trigger: mark the change as done and archive
